name: Urgewald
description: Urgewald is a German environmental and human rights NGO that follows the money trail behind environmental destruction and human rights abuses. They are best known for maintaining the Global Coal Exit List (GCEL) and the Global Oil & Gas Exit List (GOGEL), comprehensive databases that track companies operating along the thermal coal and upstream/midstream oil and gas value chains. These datasets are used by financial institutions worldwide to inform divestment and climate finance decisions.
